Operation 'transformDocument' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Transform data to document' is too generic and doesn't specify the input types or output formats. The description, while containing useful information, lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making: (1) missing explicit mention of authentication requirement, (2) no clarity on what is returned (document file/binary), (3) no explanation of the template parameter requirement, (4) missing information about error conditions or validation. Enhanced version adds authentication context, clarifies return value, emphasizes the template-driven nature of the operation, and provides better domain terminology alignment with the API's purpose of document transformation.

data.current_description: Converts XML or JSON data into PDF, HTML, PNG, or JPG documents using specified templates. Templates and notes support dynamic values using JSON path syntax like {{Data.field}}.
data.summary_suggestion: Convert XML or JSON data into formatted documents
data.description_suggestion: Transforms XML or JSON input data into high-quality documents in PDF, HTML, PNG, or JPG format using customizable templates. Supports dynamic value substitution via JSON path syntax (e.g., {{Data.field}}) in templates and notes. Requires valid API key authentication. Returns the generated document in the requested format. The operation processes the input data against the specified template and outputs a single document file.
